releases.release_description:
## What's Changed
* Support for not specifying an S3 object ACL. by @rrowlands in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/201
* Fix License notices by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/204
* Include cutline and DEM euclidean distance outputs by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/206
* add howto on image builds by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/208
* Fix arguments to setTimeout for reattempting moving temp task files by @Ooglely in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/215

## New Contributors
* @rrowlands made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/201
* @Ooglely made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/215

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/compare/v2.2.2...v2.2.3

## What's Changed
* Create initial Apptainer definition file and some initial instructions on running Apptainer on HPC by @nghi01 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/191
* Rename singularity.def to apptainer.def by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/193
* Fix confusing order to readme on rootless by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/194
* add directions on building apptainer.def by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/195
* Add precautions when building apptainer container by @nghi01 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/196
* Automatically set --gltf when processing with WebODM by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/197
* Add glTF test files by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/198

## New Contributors
* @nghi01 made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/191
* @smathermather made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/193

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/compare/v2.2.1...v2.2.2

## What's Changed
* `noRetry` in response body to stop retrying in case of non-recoverable failure. by @theoway in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/178
* Update Dockerfile.gpu and provide docker-compose.yml examples by @mhupfauer in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/179
* Import missing logger library by @Timic3 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/184
* Support for alignment files by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/189

## New Contributors
* @theoway made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/178
* @mhupfauer made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/179
* @Timic3 made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/pull/184

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/NodeODM/compare/v2.2.0...v2.2.1

- Include KMZ outputs
 - GPU improvements
 - Minor fixes

- [x] Native NodeODM on Windows
 - [x] Async task initialization support
